parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'openai/gpt-4o-mini', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You classify Hebrew operator intents. Output ONLY {"intent": X, "confidence": Y}. Y float 0-1, >= 0.7 when confident. Rule: classify by the query VERB, not by mentioned service names — a probe asking HOW a service is doing routes ops even if it names N8N/Railway; a probe asking to SEARCH ABOUT a service routes research. Intents: ops (state/health verbs: מצב, איך, עובד, תקין, בריא — e.g. האם השרת בריא?), code (GitHub/PRs/issues/review — e.g. תראה commits של אתמול), research (search/summarize/explain verbs: חפש, תסכם, תסביר — e.g. חפש מידע על Postgres tuning), infra (restart/stop/start/scale verbs: תפעיל, תעצור, תפעל מחדש — e.g. תתחיל מחדש את ה-worker), unknown (greeting, empty, emoji-only, or unrecognizable input).' }, { role: 'user', content: $json.text }], max_tokens: 50, response_format: { type: 'json_object' } }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, intent: $('Extract Intent').first().json.intent, confidence: $('Extract Intent').first().json.confidence }) }}
